mapper.sql: r.id AS room_id, r.user_id AS user_id, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email, r.assigned_admin_id AS assigned_admin_id, au.name AS assigned_admin_name, NVL(ap.status, 'OFFLINE') AS assigned_admin_status, r.status, r.user_unread_count, r.admin_unread_count, r.last_message_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at, ( SELECT DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(m.content, 1000, 1) FROM chat_messages m WHERE m.room_id = r.id ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY ) AS last_message_content, ( SELECT m.sender_type FROM chat_messages m WHERE m.room_id = r.id ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY ) AS last_sender_type
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM chat_rooms r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN users au ON au.id = r.assigned_admin_id LEFT JOIN chat_admin_presences ap ON ap.admin_id = r.assigned_admin_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT
FROM chat_rooms r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN users au ON au.id = r.assigned_admin_id LEFT JOIN chat_admin_presences ap ON ap.admin_id = r.assigned_admin_id WHERE r.id = #{roomId} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT
FROM chat_rooms r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN users au ON au.id = r.assigned_admin_id LEFT JOIN chat_admin_presences ap ON ap.admin_id = r.assigned_admin_id WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND r.assigned_admin_id = #{adminId} ORDER BY r.admin_unread_count DESC, NVL(r.last_message_at, r.created_at) DESC, r.id DESC

SELECT admin_id FROM ( SELECT u.id AS admin_id, NVL(p.status, 'OFFLINE') AS status, p.last_user_message_at FROM users u JOIN user_auth ua ON ua.user_id = u.id AND ua.auth = 'ROLE_ADMIN' LEFT JOIN chat_admin_presences p ON p.admin_id = u.id WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.id != #{excludeUserId} ORDER BY CASE NVL(p.status, 'OFFLINE') WHEN 'ONLINE' THEN 0 WHEN 'AWAY' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END ASC, p.last_user_message_at ASC NULLS FIRST, u.id ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT recent_messages.* FROM ( SELECT m.id, m.room_id, m.sender_id, m.sender_type, u.name AS sender_name, m.content, m.created_at FROM chat_messages m JOIN users u ON u.id = m.sender_id WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC ) recent_messages WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit} ) ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT previous_messages.* FROM ( SELECT m.id, m.room_id, m.sender_id, m.sender_type, u.name AS sender_name, m.content, m.created_at FROM chat_messages m JOIN users u ON u.id = m.sender_id WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} AND m.id < #{beforeMessageId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC ) previous_messages WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit} ) ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
SELECT m.id, m.room_id, m.sender_id, m.sender_type, u.name AS sender_name, m.content, m.created_at FROM chat_messages m JOIN users u ON u.id = m.sender_id WHERE m.id = #{messageId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_rooms ( user_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
INSERT INTO chat_messages ( room_id, sender_id, sender_type, content, created_at ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{senderType}, #{content}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_rooms SET status = 'OPEN', admin_unread_count = admin_unread_count + 1, last_message_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{roomId}

UPDATE chat_rooms SET status = 'OPEN', user_unread_count = user_unread_count + 1, admin_unread_count = 0, last_message_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{roomId} AND assigned_admin_id = #{adminId}
UPDATE chat_rooms SET assigned_admin_id = #{adminId}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{roomId} AND assigned_admin_id IS NULL
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO chat_admin_presences p USING (SELECT #{adminId} AS admin_id FROM dual) s ON (p.admin_id = s.admin_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET p.status = 'ONLINE', p.last_connected_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, p.updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( admin_id, status, last_connected_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( s.admin_id, 'ONLINE', SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )

MERGE INTO chat_admin_presences p USING (SELECT #{adminId} AS admin_id FROM dual) s ON (p.admin_id = s.admin_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET p.status = 'OFFLINE', p.last_disconnected_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, p.updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( admin_id, status, last_disconnected_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( s.admin_id, 'OFFLINE', SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )

MERGE INTO chat_admin_presences p USING ( SELECT #{adminId} AS admin_id, #{status} AS status FROM dual ) s ON (p.admin_id = s.admin_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET p.status = s.status, p.updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( admin_id, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( s.admin_id, s.status, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )

MERGE INTO chat_admin_presences p USING (SELECT #{adminId} AS admin_id FROM dual) s ON (p.admin_id = s.admin_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET p.last_user_message_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, p.updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( admin_id, status, last_user_message_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( s.admin_id, 'OFFLINE', SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_rooms SET user_unread_count = 0, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{roomId}
UPDATE chat_rooms SET admin_unread_count = 0, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{roomId}
